nasb.text: Now when day came, there was no small disturbance among the soldiers as to what could have become of Peter.

esv.text: Now when day came, there was no little disturbance among the soldiers over what had become of Peter.

cnv.text: 天亮的時候，士兵們非常慌亂，不知彼得出了甚麼事。

ccb.text: 天亮后，监狱的守卫发现彼得不见了，顿时一片骚动。

csbs.text: 到天亮，士兵们中间起了不小的骚动，不知道彼得出了什么事。
